scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @reading-hub/backend" "npx wait-on http://localhost:4000/health -t 30000 && npm run dev -w @reading-hub/frontend"
scripts.db:setup: docker compose up -d && npm run db:push -w @reading-hub/backend
scripts.build: npm run build -w @reading-hub/backend && npm run build -w @reading-hub/frontend
